The punchline often arrives before the set-up. Do you know the problem with UDP jokes?
Why was the JavaScript developer sad? He didn't know how to null his feelings.
What do you get when you cross a React developer with a mathematician? A function component.
Why did the functions stop calling each other? Because they had constant arguments.
Why did the programmer bring a broom to work? To clean up all the bugs.
A SQL query walks into a bar, walks up to two tables and asks... 'Can I join you?'
Knock-knock. A race condition. Who is there?
What is the most used language in programming? Profanity.
Why don't programmers like nature? Too many bugs.
Why dot net developers don't wear glasses? Because they see sharp.
How do you make the number one disappear? Add the letter G and it’s “gone”!
How did Darth Vader know what Luke was getting for Christmas? He felt his presents.
How come the stadium got hot after the game? Because all of the fans left.
I bought some shoes from a drug dealer. I don't know what he laced them with, but I was tripping all day!
What did the Red light say to the Green light? Don't look at me I'm changing!
What did the left eye say to the right eye? Between us, something smells!
Why did the barber win the race? He took a short cut.
Why don't you find hippopotamuses hiding in trees? They're really good at it.
Why are oranges the smartest fruit? Because they are made to concentrate.
What do birds give out on Halloween? Tweets.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Little old lady. 
 Little old lady who? I didn't know you could yodel!
